info.name: Demo Tax Provider
info.description:
This collection can be used to test your [demo tax provider](https://github.com/hatertron3000/demo-tax-provider) locally. Before using, configure the following environment variables: | **VARIABLE** | **VALUE** | | --- | --- | | tax-provider-username | TAX_PROVIDER_USERNAME
*from your application's environment (.env)* | | tax-provider-password | TAX_PROVIDER_PASSWORD
*from your application's environment (.env)* | | host | Your application's hostname and protocol
*(e.g. http://localhost:3000)* |

response.name: Estimate Taxes (prices exclusive)
Estimate Taxes - (prices inclusive)
Estimate Taxes with 5s Delay (prices exclusive)
